sections.paragraph:
fut. יָשִׂישׂ, once יָשׂוּשׂ Isa 35:1, imp. שִׂישׂ, inf. absol. שֹׂושׂ, constr. שׂוּשׂ to rejoice, to be glad (prop. to leap, to spring, see סוּס ), Job 3:22, followed by עַל Deu 28:63 30:9 followed by בְּ in any thing, Isa 65:19 Psa 119:14 specially שׂוּשׂ בַּיהֹוָה Psa 40:17 70:5 followed by suff. Isa 35:1, יְשֻׂשׂוּם “they shall rejoice for these things” (which are spoken of in the preceding chapter).

Derivatives, מָשֹׂושׂ, שָׂשֹׂון.
